items.summary: As you perhaps know by now, the Nomad 2026 Anniversary Sale is now live to deliver the brand’s most wide-ranging discount event of the year. We have already detailed the all-time lows on its latest 25W Qi2 MagSafe chargers, leather iPhone cases, and Find My Tracking Cards, so let’s take a look at the Apple Watch band deals now.

items.title: Add wall outlets, USB-A, and Type-C to your ride with this 200W 8-in-1 power inverter, now $18
items.summary:
TESSAN 200W 8-in-1 Car Power Inverter

Buy for $18 (Reg. $23)

What we love

While a lot of devices can be topped off with USB-A and Type-C these days, sometimes you want an AC outlet. This power inverter brings two to your vehicle for $18 Prime shipped. It also packs 6 USB outputs with USB-C that can reach 36W.

items.title: LEGO’s 768-piece Horizon Adventures set with two minifigures + the Shell-Walker and Sawtooth is down at $29 right now
items.summary:
LEGO Horizon Adventures Aloy & Varl vs. Shell-Walker & Sawtooth set

Buy for $29 (Reg. $45)

What we love

Stacking up to 768 pieces, this LEGO Horizon Adventures set lets you recreate the adventures of the game’s protagonist, Aloy, and her friend Varl (both in minifigure form and complete with weapons), as they battle the Shell-Walker and Sawtooth. The Shell-Walker comes with posable legs and arms, as well as an articulable claw, while Sawtooth comes full articulated with opening jaws, a swiveling torso, while also having a posable neck, head, and legs. It makes a great addition to any collections for builders and gamers alike.
